description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof with a prominent overhang and a two-story section at the rear, creating a striking geometric profile. The exterior is finished in a combination of dark and light materials, with large windows on the ground floor and a distinctive balcony or terrace area above the entrance. The front includes a spacious driveway and a landscaped garden area with greenery and a tree, enclosed by a low fence. The rear and side elevations are more minimal, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The building's clean lines and open spaces suggest a contemporary architectural style, emphasizing functionality and outdoor integration. The overall structure is robust, with concrete, glass, and metal elements dominating the visual impression.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a two-story rear section, large windows, and a landscaped front garden with a driveway. The exterior features dark and light finishes, clean lines, and a prominent balcony.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, landscaped garden, main entrance, and balcony above the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, minimal window arrangement, and the enclosed garden area with a tree.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wall with minimal openings and the flat roof structure.
description_view_3: Back and side view emphasizing the building's geometric form, flat roof, and the length of the driveway and garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing and minimal side windows
